rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA A. GRIJALVA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents' Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings; Notice Of Motion Mem. Of Points'S And Authorities.
rulings.Rulings: Motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied without prejudice.
